heading: Coast Guard band recordings for commercial sale
label: 935 Coast Guard band recordings for commercial sale
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 640 of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 640 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: The Coast Guard band may produce recordings for commercial sale.

children.label: b
children.text: Amounts received as proceeds from the sale of any such recordings may be credited to applicable appropriations of the Coast Guard for expenses of the Coast Guard band.

children.label: c
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe regulations governing the accounting of such proceeds.
